title: 2021 AMC 12B Problems/Problem 1
problem: How many integer values of $x$ satisfy $|x|<3\pi$ ? $\textbf{(A)} ~9 \qquad\textbf{(B)} ~10 \qquad\textbf{(C)} ~18 \qquad\textbf{(D)} ~19 \qquad\textbf{(E)} ~20$
solution: Since $3\pi\approx9.42$ , we multiply $9$ by $2$ for the integers from $1$ to $9$ and the integers from $-1$ to $-9$ and add $1$ to account for $0$ to get $\boxed{\textbf{(D)} ~19}$ . ~smarty101 and edited by Tony_Li2007 and sl_hc
